summary: RTW status inconsistency bug fix verified. Audit Quick View now shows 'Verified' for RTW (was showing 'Pending Review'). What's Needed tab shows 'Checked & Approved' for both RTW Documents and RTW Verification. Documents card correctly shows 'All Verified'. All status displays are now consistent using single source of truth from backend rtw_summary and dbs_summary functions.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: rtw_summary returns status='verified', rtw_status_label='Verified' for employee with verified RTW docs
✅ Backend: dbs_summary returns dbs_status='current', dbs_status_label='Current' for employee with verified DBS
✅ Backend: All requirements use 'verified' field (not deprecated 'is_verified')
✅ Frontend: Audit Quick View RTW card shows 'Verified' (green)
✅ Frontend: Audit Quick View DBS card shows 'Current' (green)
✅ Frontend: Audit Quick View Documents card shows 'All Verified' (green)
✅ Frontend: Audit Quick View Progress card shows '81% Complete'
✅ Frontend: What's Needed tab RTW Documents shows 'Checked & Approved'
✅ Frontend: What's Needed tab RTW Verification shows 'Checked & Approved'
✅ Frontend: Status consistency between Audit Quick View and What's Needed tab verified
critical_code_review_comments: get_employee_rtw_summary() at lines 1518-1608 correctly computes RTW status from both right_to_work_documents and right_to_work_check requirements
Frontend correctly uses complianceRequirements?.rtw_summary for Audit Quick View RTW card (line 1521)
Frontend correctly uses 'verified' field (not 'is_verified') for Documents card status calculation (line 1537)
Single source of truth pattern properly implemented - backend computes status, frontend displays it
context_for_next_testing_agent: RTW status bug fix verified. The fix involved: 1) Creating get_employee_rtw_summary() backend function as single source of truth (similar to existing get_employee_dbs_summary()), 2) Fixing Documents card to use 'verified' field instead of 'is_verified'. Both Audit Quick View and What's Needed tab now show consistent status for RTW items.

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: RTW card in Audit Quick View showed 'Pending Review' while What's Needed showed 'Checked & Approved'
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: 1) No single source of truth for RTW status (unlike DBS which had dbs_summary), 2) Documents card used wrong field name 'is_verified' instead of 'verified'
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: 1) Created get_employee_rtw_summary() function at lines 1518-1608, 2) Fixed Documents card to use 'verified' field
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: RTW card now shows 'Verified', Documents card shows 'All Verified', What's Needed shows 'Checked & Approved' - all consistent
